title: Old Grudges Explode in the Ring
description: Pages 1–4 focus on old grudges explode in the ring, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Jesus Burgess, Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as luffy and Chinjao fight with the weight of Garp’s past behind them, while Dressrosa’s hidden conflicts keep expanding outside the arena.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...he's ....!! He's not even moving an inch!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HE BROUGHT DOWN THEIGHT WARRIORIN ONE HIIT!!!LIFY'S POWERIS OVER WHELMING!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: with- out a doubt, this former candidate to win it all, hajrubin ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Has been eliminated!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is absolutely a stunning upset!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hup

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There's just no stopping the excitement and anticipation at this point!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You're amazing, Lucy!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: At the eye of the storm that's descended onto C-block!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'll carry you over to the edge, UCY

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Lucy has done it again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hmph

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We still can't even get a measure on this man!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Well of course he has

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I CAN'T BELIEVE IT ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: that he would be this strong ...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Lucy!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: This is the ring ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: IF YOU'RE GONNA SLEEP, DO IT SOME- WHERE ELSE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hajrudin's enormous body was blown away by an explosion !!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What on earth could have....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: No, that was no explosion!! ...even if hajrudin is out

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: C-Block is still crawl-ling with some real monsters!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The punch launched from those strange- looking should- DERS...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Only looked like an explosion !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ideo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The one who sent the giant's body flying was....!!

dialogue.speaker: Jesus Burgess
dialogue.text: The V2 champion of the new world central fighting club!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Demolition cannon idea !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I want to be stronger

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So I'll be eating that Mera Mera No mi!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I need more power!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Further- more

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: There are some others who've gotten our attention !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: They've come from the Far East Nation of Kanokuni

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This gang of three!! And they've got a different flavor altogether!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: to think that this is the day that our fair colosseum...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Would get to see such renowned kenpo users in action!!

summary: Pages 1–4 focus on old grudges explode in the ring, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
